name: @atrium/codex
description: Codex, x402-payable HTTP API gateway for Atrium

scripts._comment_migrate: Audit HHHH-2: schema migration must run before deploy. The D1 schema (src/db/schema.sql) declares 5 tables; without an explicit migrate step, `wrangler deploy` ships a Worker that throws 'no such table' on every route hit. Default `deploy` now chains migrate → deploy.
